formulas.name: Equation of Motion
formulas.notes: Use this formula to find displacement when acceleration is constant.
formulas.variables: s: displacement, s0: initial displacement, v: final velocity, t: time, a: acceleration

formulas.name: Equation of Motion (in terms of initial velocity)
formulas.notes: Use this formula when initial velocity is given.
formulas.variables: s: displacement, s0: initial displacement, v0: initial velocity, t: time, a: acceleration

formulas.name: Equation of Motion (in terms of final velocity)
formulas.notes: Use this formula when final velocity is to be found.
formulas.variables: v: final velocity, v0: initial velocity, a: acceleration, t: time

formulas.name: Equation of Motion (in terms of initial velocity and time)
formulas.notes: Use this formula when initial velocity and time are given.
formulas.variables: s: displacement, s0: initial displacement, v0: initial velocity, t: time

formulas.name: Equation of Motion (in terms of acceleration and time)
formulas.notes: Use this formula when acceleration and time are given.
formulas.variables: s: displacement, a: acceleration, v0: initial velocity, t: time

formulas.name: Equation of Motion (in terms of acceleration and displacement)
formulas.notes: Use this formula when acceleration and displacement are given.
formulas.variables: v: final velocity, v0: initial velocity, a: acceleration, s: displacement

formulas.name: Velocity-Displacement Equation
formulas.notes: Use this formula to find final velocity when initial velocity, acceleration, and displacement are given.
formulas.variables: v: final velocity, u: initial velocity, a: acceleration, s: displacement

formulas.name: Equation of Motion (in terms of displacement and time)
formulas.notes: Use this formula when displacement and time are given.
formulas.variables: v: final velocity, s: displacement, s0: initial displacement, t: time

formulas.name: Velocity-Time Equation
formulas.notes: Use this formula to find acceleration when change in velocity and time are given.
formulas.variables: a: acceleration, Δv: change in velocity, Δt: change in time

formulas.name: First Equation of Motion
formulas.notes: Use this formula to find final velocity when initial velocity, acceleration, and displacement are given.
formulas.variables: v: final velocity, u: initial velocity, a: acceleration, s: displacement

formulas.name: Second Equation of Motion
formulas.notes: Use this formula to find displacement when initial velocity and acceleration are given.
formulas.variables: s: displacement, u: initial velocity, t: time, a: acceleration

formulas.name: Third Equation of Motion
formulas.notes: Use this formula to find final velocity when initial velocity, acceleration, and displacement are given.
formulas.variables: v: final velocity, u: initial velocity, a: acceleration, s: displacement

formulas.name: Equation of Motion under Gravity
formulas.notes: Use this formula to find displacement under gravity when initial velocity and time are given.
formulas.variables: s: displacement, u: initial velocity, g: acceleration due to gravity, t: time
